name: gorkbot_bash_tester
description: Safely executes a list of bash commands for Gorkbot tool diagnostics and testing, creates a configurable test log directory (default /tmp/gorkbot_test), runs commands with timeout and capture, logs individual results, computes overall success rate mimicking query_system_state patterns (e.g., bash 72% success), and reports in JSON.
author: ToolForge
